article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.12. Attachment 2 - Council report dated Feb. 25, 2025 (E-COMM) 2026-02-10.pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on $7.2M extension of Burnaby's police dispatch contract with E-COMM
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on extending its police dispatch contract with E-COMM Emergency Communications For BC by one year (Jan–Dec 2025) at an estimated cost of $7,194,789, while a provincial review of E-COMM is completed and a new long-term agreement is drafted.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision — this affects how Burnaby's emergency dispatch is funded and operated in 2025.
briefs.article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.12. Attachment 2 - Council report dated Feb. 25, 2025 (E-COMM) 2026-02-10.pdf
